user.title: Xplora Watch Tracker
user.description: Enter your Xplora account credentials (same as goplay.xplora.com).

watches.title: Name Your Watches
watches.description:
Found {watch_count} watch(es): {watches}.

Set a friendly name for each watch and choose how often to poll for updates ({min_interval}–{max_interval} seconds, default {default_interval}s).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Xplora API. Check your internet connection.
error.no_watches: No watches found on this account.
error.endpoint_must_use_https: Endpoint must use HTTPS (must start with https://)
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the HA logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Xplora account is already configured.

init.title: Xplora Watch Tracker Options
init.description: Adjust poll interval ({min_interval}–{max_interval} seconds), watch display names, and Xplora API settings.
